failedAssertions.reason: buy-simulation executed on testnet but fill could not be verified (no trade events and no balance delta).
performance-report generated slippage comparison but lacked required execution-time and gas-inclusive total-cost metrics.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: market-maker-test could not fund generated taker account; faucet path unavailable and taker tx failed with INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE.
frontend connected to testnet market/depth, but live trade/candle data remained empty (/trades and /candles returned []).
no funded sign-capable wallet session was available to execute a frontend swap in isolated browser validation.
historical/marker visuals present but live post-marker candles unavailable, preventing continuity verification.
no live trade trigger to exercise rightmost-candle real-time update; frontend trade trigger path was wallet-blocked.

appliedUpdates.description: Added integration-test setup notes: avoid placeholder .env for on-chain scripts, use cash-testnet profile-derived env vars; documented taker faucet limitation and live-trade prerequisite checks for chart assertions.
